content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the orange dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on the left side of the track following the curve well.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 49, target = (49 + 5) % 121 = 54
- Target WP54: (4.5964, 2.8790)
- Car: x=5.3543, y=2.5653, heading=-175.15°
- dy = 2.8790 - 2.5653 = 0.3137
- dx = 4.5964 - 5.3543 = -0.7579
- bearing = atan2(0.3137, -0.7579) = 180° - atan2(0.3137, 0.7579) = 180° - 22.50° = 157.50°
- delta = 157.50° - (-175.15°) = 332.65° → normalize: 332.65 - 360 = -27.35°
- |delta| ≈ 27° → moderate right correction, steering_angle=-15°

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead but WP54 is still to the right of current heading (delta=-27.35°), continuing moderate right steering at speed 1.5 to align with the waypoint line.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track heads west around WP46-52, then curves left (southwest) toward WP55+",
    "Car is consistently ~0.2m left of center on westward section — stable position",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "Delta around -25 to -27° on this westward section requires steering_angle=-15",
    "After WP54-56, track curves sharply left heading southwest — prepare to steer left",
    "Heading wraps near ±180° when traveling west — normalize delta carefully",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on moderate curves; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "WP54+ marks increasing left curve heading southwest, left steering needed soon",
    "Car has been consistently right-correcting on westward section — pattern is stable",
    "Watch for delta sign flip when track turns left past WP55-56"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.659, 5.567, 5.453, 5.354],
    "y": [2.587, 2.571, 2.564, 2.565],
    "yaw": [-171.82, -171.59, -173.42, -175.15]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP54 at (4.596, 2.879): dy=0.314, dx=-0.758, bearing=157.5°, delta=-27.35° → moderate right, steer -15°",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -15.0
}
```
